title: dacryodes maguipensis
intro: Dacryodes maguipensis, also known as the Mindanao canarium or Mindanao canarium nut tree, is a species of tree in the family Burseraceae. The tree is native to the Philippines and produces edible nuts, seeds, and essential oils that have been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Dacryodes maguipensis include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The tree's herbal preparations include its seeds, nuts, and leaves, which are used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, providing health benefits such as pain relief, improved digestion, and boosted immune systems.
